SLIMEBOSS-BRONZE_SLIME.name: Bronze Slime
SLIMEBOSS-CULTIST_SLIME.name: Cultist Slime
SLIMEBOSS-DARKLING_SLIME.name: Darkling Slime
SLIMEBOSS-GREED_SLIME.name: Greed Ooze
SLIMEBOSS-SCRAP_SLIME.name: Scrap Ooze
SLIMEBOSS-TORCHHEAD_SLIME.name: Torch Head Slime
SLIMEBOSS-GUERILLA_SLIME.name: Guerilla Slime
SLIMEBOSS-LEECHING_SLIME.name: Leeching Slime
SLIMEBOSS-BRUISER_SLIME.name: Bruiser Slime
SLIMEBOSS-MIRE_SLIME.name: Mire Slime
SLIMEBOSS-GHOSTFLAME_SLIME.name: Ghostflame Slime
SLIMEBOSS-INSULTING_SLIME.name: Insulting Slime
SLIMEBOSS-ANCIENT_SLIME.name: Ancient Slime
SLIMEBOSS-SPIKY_SLIME.name: Protector Slime
SLIMEBOSS-TIME_SLIME.name: Time Slime
SLIMEBOSS-ANCIENT_SLIME.description:
Deals [blue]3[/blue] damage and causes you to draw [blue]1[/blue] card each turn.
Draw does not scale with [gold]Potency[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-TORCHHEAD_SLIME.description: Deals [blue]6[/blue] damage. Gains damage from your [gold]Strength[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-BRUISER_SLIME.description: Deals [blue]3[/blue] damage to a random enemy twice.
SLIMEBOSS-LEECHING_SLIME.description: Deals [blue]1[/blue] damage to an enemy and grants [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] to the Slime Boss.
SLIMEBOSS-MIRE_SLIME.description: Deals [blue]2[/blue] damage and applies [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Goop[/gold] to an enemy.
SLIMEBOSS-SPIKY_SLIME.description: Deals [blue]4[/blue] damage and grants [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold] to the Slime Boss for a turn.
SLIMEBOSS-GHOSTFLAME_SLIME.description: Deals [blue]4[/blue] damage and applies [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Soulburn[/gold] to an enemy.
SLIMEBOSS-BRONZE_SLIME.description: Deals [blue]10[/blue] damage to ALL enemies, then goes to sleep for [blue]2[/blue] turns.
SLIMEBOSS-INSULTING_SLIME.description: Deals [blue]4[/blue] damage and applies [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to an enemy.
SLIMEBOSS-TIME_SLIME.description: Deals [blue]4[/blue] damage and applies [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] to an enemy.
SLIMEBOSS-CULTIST_SLIME.description: Deals [blue]6[/blue] damage. After attacking, increases its damage by [blue]1[/blue].
